Jupyter Lab IT Infrastructure Work (Wednesday, May 8th, 2024 at 19:00 KST)

2024. 05. 07

Dear users,

 

We inform that the scheduled IT Infrastructure work on Jupyter Lab is going to be conducted as below.
Please keep in mind this and be prepared.

 

  • Work Scope : Apply source code to improve usability
                                - Display kernel session timeout information

 

  • Schedule : Wednesday, May 8th, 2024 at 19:00 (KST)

 

  • User Impact : Suspend Jupyter Lab service (About 10 minutes)

 

  • Detail
    - Remaining Kernel session time (session time out is set to 2 hours of inactivity) is displayed in Kernel status
     
     
    - Pop-up window starts to be shown 10 minutes before kernel session time out
       <Within 10 minutes before kernel session time out>
       
      
       < After kernel session time out >
       
     

If you have further questions, please contact us through Big Data Portal > Support > Contact Us. We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

 

Thank you.

New Jupyter Lab Feature (Upload file without SBC) and IT Infrastructure Work (Tuesday, March 19th at 19:00, KST)

2024. 03. 18

Dear users,

We inform that the new Jupyter Lab feature (Upload file without SBC) and the relative IT Infrastructure work is going to be conducted to update this change. 

 

Now you can upload file without SBC environment which has been supported only in SBC environment. The IT infrastructure work to apply this change is scheduled for Tuesday, March 19th at 19:00 (KST). Please keep in mind this and be prepared.

 

  • New feature : Upload file without SBC environment

 

  • Schedule : Tuesday, March 19th at 19:00 (KST)

 

  • User impact : Suspend Jupyter Lab service (About 10 minutes)

 

  • Feature detail
    - In File Browser extension, drag & drop file to upload or click upload button 


             

 

If you have further questions, please contact us through Big Data Portal > Support > Contact Us. We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

 

Thank you.

New Jupyter Lab Feature and IT Infrastructure Work (Wednesday, March 6th at 19:00, KST)

2024. 02. 27

Dear users,

 

We inform that the new Jupyter Lab feature and the relative IT Infrastructure work is going to be conducted to update this change. Now you can see support menu and shortcuts ( FAQ / Contact US / Feature Request ) to Big Data Portal page. The IT infrastructure work to apply this change is scheduled for Wednesday, March 6th at 7 PM (KST). Please keep in mind this and be prepared.

 

  • New feature : Support menu and shortcuts ( FAQ / Contact US / Feature Request ) to Big Data Portal page.

 

  • Schedule : Wednesday, March 6th at 19:00 (KST)

 

  • User impact : Suspend Jupyter Lab service (About 5 minutes)

 

  • New Feature Detail
    - Support menu is added
    - Shortcuts ( FAQ / Contact US / Feature Request ) to the relative Big Data Portal pages.
       (User Guide was previously supported)

 

If you have further questions, please contact us through Big Data Portal > Support > Contact Us. We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

 

Thank you.

            ######################### NIE ZMIENIAJ TEJ KOMÓRKI ##########################
            import os
            import numpy as np
            from PIL import Image
            import numpy as np
            import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
            import typing
            from sklearn.cluster import KMeans
            ​
            import glob
            Last executed at 2024-05-21 14:39:03 in 2.73s
            [ ]:
             
            ######################### NIE ZMIENIAJ TEJ KOMÓRKI ##########################
            ​
            # Klasa, która ułatwia wczytywanie obrazków z danego folderu
            class ImageDataset:
                def __init__(self, image_dir: str):
                    self.filelist = glob.glob(image_dir + "/*.jpg")
                    self.IMAGE_DIMS = (512, 512)
            ​
                def __len__(self):
                    return len(self.filelist)
            ​
                def __getitem__(self, idx) -> np.ndarray:
                    with Image.open(self.filelist[idx]) as image:
                        image = image.convert('RGB')
                        image = image.resize(self.IMAGE_DIMS)
                        return np.array(image)
            ​
                def __iter__(self) -> typing.Iterator[np.ndarray]:
                    return (self[i] for i in range(len(self.filelist)))
            Last executed at 2024-05-21 14:39:04 in 157ms
            [7]:
            xxxxxxxxxx
             
            # Wyświetl zestawienie oryginału i zkwantyzowanego obrazka
            def show_quantization_results(original, quantized):
                    _, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(8, 4))
                    ax[0].imshow(original)
                    ax[0].set_title("Oryginał")
                    ax[0].axis("off")
            ​
                    ax[1].imshow(quantized)
                    ax[1].set_title("Wynik kwantyzacji")
                    ax[1].axis("off")
                    plt.show()
            Last executed at 2024-05-21 14:39:04 in 3ms
            [8]:
             
            def get_agent_cost(agent_penalty_list): #bierze listę i oblicza strate
                return 21* np.max(agent_penalty_list) + 42* np.mean(agent_penalty_list)
            ​
            ​
            def get_cluster_penalties(agent): #bierze agenta i zwraca liste jego kar
                vertices = np.array([
                    [0, 0, 0], [0, 0, 255], [0, 255, 0], [0, 255, 255],
                    [255, 0, 0], [255, 0, 255], [255, 255, 0], [255, 255, 255]
                ])
                
                pixels = agent.reshape(-1,3)
                
                differences = pixels[:, np.newaxis, :] - vertices[np.newaxis, :, :]
                squared_distances = np.sum(differences**2, axis=2)
                costs = np.sqrt(np.min(squared_distances, axis=1))
            ​
                return costs
            ​
            def color_cost(img_quant):
                vertices = np.array([
                    [0, 0, 0], [0, 0, 255], [0, 255, 0], [0, 255, 255],
                    [255, 0, 0], [255, 0, 255], [255, 255, 0], [255, 255, 255]
                ])
                
                pixels = img_quant.reshape(-1,3)
                
                differences = pixels[:, np.newaxis, :] - vertices[np.newaxis, :, :]
                squared_distances = np.sum(differences**2, axis=2)
                costs = np.sqrt(np.min(squared_distances, axis=1))
            ​
                return np.mean(costs), np.max(costs)
            ​
            def cluster_match(pixels,agent): #->q_img
                z = agent.reshape(37,1,3)
                return z[np.argmin(np.sum(np.abs(pixels-z),axis=2),axis=0)].reshape(pixels.shape[0],3)
            ​
            def MSE_calc(img,img_quant):
                return ((img_quant.astype(np.float32) - img.astype(np.float32))**2).mean()
                #return np.sum(np.sum(np.abs(img-q_img),axis=1)**2)/img.shape[0]
            Last executed at 2024-05-21 14:39:06 in 7ms

            img = ImageDataset("train_data")[1]
            pixels = img.reshape(-1, 3)
            plt.imshow(pixels.reshape(512,512,3));
            Last executed at 2024-05-21 14:39:07 in 736ms
            [ ]:
            xxxxxxxxxx
             
            #GENERATE POPULATION BY CONFIG
            ​
            N = 30            #musi być parzyste
            k_top = 14        #im mniejsze tym podobniejsi do siebie
            mutate_rate = 0.15 #im większe tym więcej mutacji
            number_of_episodes = 25
            ​
            BEST = 10**6
            ​
            ​
            assert N % 2 == 0
            assert k_top >= 2 and k_top % 2 == 0
            ​
            # M1 = np.random.randint(0,255,(N,37,3))
            grandfather = KMeans(n_clusters=37).fit(pixels).cluster_centers_.astype(np.uint8)
            M1 = np.array([grandfather + np.random.randint(-20,20,(37,3)) for _ in range(N)])
            ​
            BEST_AGENT = []
            score_history = [BEST]
            [ ]:
             
            plt.imshow(cluster_match(pixels, grandfather).reshape(512,512,3))
            [ ]:
             
            quantization_score(pixels,cluster_match(pixels, grandfather))
            Last executed at 2024-05-16 14:36:57 in 852ms
            MSE: 3776.0264, max_color_cost: 202.3882, mean_color_cost: 118.2283
Score: 16767.7955
            [42]:
            16767.79546494282
            [ ]:
            xxxxxxxxxx
             
            #MAIN LOOP FOR AGENT LIST
            for episode in range(number_of_episodes):
                #1.1 SCORING
                agent_scores = []
                penalty_memory = []
                local_best = 10**7
                local_best_agent=[]
                print(f"-----Starting--E{episode+1}/E{number_of_episodes}---")
                for agent in M1: #M1 to np.array rozmiaru (N,37,3)
                    q_img = cluster_match(pixels,agent)
                    penalty_vector = get_cluster_penalties(agent) # lista kar dla klastrów agenta
            ​
                    penalty_color = get_agent_cost(penalty_vector) # jedna wartosc
                    penalty_mse = MSE_calc(pixels,q_img) #druga wartość
            ​
                    agent_scores.append(penalty_color + 2*penalty_mse)
                    penalty_memory.append(penalty_vector)
            ​
                    #print(penalty_color + penalty_mse)
                    if penalty_color + penalty_mse < local_best:
                        local_best = penalty_color + penalty_mse
                        local_best_agent = agent
            ​
                    #plt.imshow(q_img.reshape(512,512,3))
                    #plt.show()
            ​
                agent_scores = np.array(agent_scores).round(4)
                penalty_memory=np.array(penalty_memory)
            ​
                if local_best < BEST:
                    BEST = local_best
                    BEST_AGENT = local_best_agent
                    print(f"NEW GLOBAL BEST FOUNDED: {BEST}")
                    if BEST < 8000:
                        print("!")
                        break
                score_history.append(BEST)
                
                print(f"local best: {local_best}",f"mean score: {np.mean(agent_scores)}")
                #print("------SELECTING-----")
            ​
                #2.1 SELEKCJA
                #np.argsort(agent_scores)
                #print(np.argsort(agent_scores)[:k_top])
                w_index= np.argsort(agent_scores)[:k_top]
                #winners = M1[w_index] # wybierz top k rzeczy
            ​
                #2.2 CROSS
                offspring = []
                for _ in range((N-k_top)//2):
                    to_breed = np.random.choice(range(M1[w_index].shape[0]),2,replace=False,p= 1/(agent_scores[w_index]*np.sum(1/agent_scores[w_index])))
                    #mutacja X i mutacja Y
            ​
            ​
                    # 2.2.1 MUTATE
                    p_factor = np.concatenate((penalty_memory[to_breed[0]]/np.sum(penalty_memory[to_breed[0]]),penalty_memory[to_breed[1]]/np.sum(penalty_memory[to_breed[1]])))
                    mutator = np.abs(np.random.normal(0,mutate_rate,37*2))
                    #mutator
                    to_mutate = p_factor >= mutator #DO ZMUTOWANIA
                    #raise
            ​
                    genomes = M1[to_breed].reshape(74,3)
                    genomes[to_mutate] = np.random.randint(0,255,(np.sum(to_mutate),3))
                    np.random.shuffle(genomes)
            ​
                    offspring.append(genomes[:37])
                    offspring.append(genomes[37:])
            ​
                M1 = np.concatenate((M1[w_index],np.array(offspring)))
            ​
                #print(f"----END-OF-GEN--{episode}----")
            ​
            #score_history
            print(BEST)  
            plt.imshow(cluster_match(pixels, BEST_AGENT).reshape(512,512,3))
            plt.show()
            plt.plot(score_history[1:])
            plt.show()

            from time import time
            s=time()

            [ ]:
             
            #COMPETITION
            Last executed at 2024-05-21 14:51:41 in 163ms
            [ ]:
            xxxxxxxxxx
             
            sc_list=[]
            for img in ImageDataset("valid_data"):
                pixels = img.reshape(-1, 3)
                plt.imshow(pixels.reshape(512,512,3))
                plt.show()
                
                #GENERATE POPULATION BY CONFIG
            ​
                N = 14      #musi być parzyste
                k_top = 4        #im mniejsze tym podobniejsi do siebie
                mutate_rate = 0.15 #im większe tym więcej mutacji
                number_of_episodes = 25
            ​
                BEST = 10**6
            ​
            ​
                assert N % 2 == 0
                assert k_top >= 2 and k_top % 2 == 0
            ​
                # M1 = np.random.randint(0,255,(N,37,3))
                grandfather = KMeans(n_clusters=37,max_iter=100).fit(pixels).cluster_centers_.astype(np.uint8)
                M1 = np.array([grandfather + np.random.randint(-20,20,(37,3)) for _ in range(N)])
                
                BEST_AGENT = []
                score_history = [BEST]
                
                #MAIN LOOP FOR AGENT LIST
                for episode in range(number_of_episodes):
                    #1.1 SCORING
                    agent_scores = []
                    penalty_memory = []
                    local_best = 10**7
                    local_best_agent=[]
                    print(f"-----Starting--E{episode+1}/E{number_of_episodes}---")
                    for agent in M1: #M1 to np.array rozmiaru (N,37,3)
                        q_img = cluster_match(pixels,agent)
                        penalty_vector = get_cluster_penalties(agent) # lista kar dla klastrów agenta
            ​
                        penalty_color = get_agent_cost(penalty_vector) # jedna wartosc
                        penalty_mse = MSE_calc(pixels,q_img) #druga wartość
            ​
                        agent_scores.append(penalty_color + 2*penalty_mse)
                        penalty_memory.append(penalty_vector)
            ​
                        #print(penalty_color + penalty_mse)
                        if penalty_color + penalty_mse < local_best:
                            local_best = (penalty_color + penalty_mse).round(4)
                            local_best_agent = agent
            ​
                        #plt.imshow(q_img.reshape(512,512,3))
                        #plt.show()
            ​
                    agent_scores = np.array(agent_scores).round(4)
                    penalty_memory=np.array(penalty_memory)
            ​
                    if local_best < BEST:
                        BEST = local_best
                        BEST_AGENT = local_best_agent
                        print(f"NEW GLOBAL BEST FOUNDED: {BEST}")
                        if BEST < 8100:
                            print("!")
                            break
                    score_history.append(BEST)
            ​
                    print(f"local best: {local_best}",f"mean score: {np.mean(agent_scores)}")
                    #print("------SELECTING-----")
            ​
                    #2.1 SELEKCJA
                    #np.argsort(agent_scores)
                    #print(np.argsort(agent_scores)[:k_top])
                    w_index= np.argsort(agent_scores)[:k_top]
            ​
                    
                    #2.2 CROSS
                    offspring = []
                    for _ in range((N-k_top)//2):
                        to_breed = np.random.choice(range(M1[w_index].shape[0]),2,replace=False,p= 1/(agent_scores[w_index]*np.sum(1/agent_scores[w_index])))
                        #mutacja X i mutacja Y
            ​
            ​
                        # 2.2.1 MUTATE
                        p_factor = np.concatenate((penalty_memory[to_breed[0]]/np.sum(penalty_memory[to_breed[0]]),penalty_memory[to_breed[1]]/np.sum(penalty_memory[to_breed[1]])))
                        mutator = np.abs(np.random.normal(0,mutate_rate,37*2))
                        #mutator
                        to_mutate = p_factor >= mutator #DO ZMUTOWANIA
                        #raise
            ​
                        genomes = M1[to_breed].reshape(74,3)
                        genomes[to_mutate] = np.random.randint(0,255,(np.sum(to_mutate),3))
                        np.random.shuffle(genomes)
            ​
                        offspring.append(genomes[:37])
                        offspring.append(genomes[37:])
            ​
                    M1 = np.concatenate((M1[w_index],np.array(offspring)))
            ​
                    #print(f"----END-OF-GEN--{episode}----")
            ​
                    #score_history
                print(BEST)  
                plt.imshow(cluster_match(pixels, BEST_AGENT).reshape(512,512,3))
                plt.show()
                plt.plot(score_history[1:])
                plt.show()
            ​
                sc_list.append(BEST)
            print(f"FINAL SCORE: {np.mean(sc_list)}")
